summary: Day 4 updates: Death toll in Iran rises to 787; US casualties to 6 killed. Israel launches ground invasion of Lebanon opening new front. Iran declares Strait of Hormuz "closed," threatening ships; shipping effectively halted, oil up 13%, gas up 40-50%. NATO chief expresses support; China/Russia condemn attacks as illegal. Strike on IRIB headquarters, parliament building; Assembly of Experts bombed during supreme leader election meeting. Expert consensus remains sharply divided on whether airpower can achieve regime change.
